Verified vs official VT Admissions Transfer Roadmaps 2025-2026 and Transfer Guide PDFs directly fetched via transfervirginia.org (May 2026). Guaranteed admission for VCCS students: AS Engineering + 3.2 GPA. Roadmap disclaimer: completing Required courses does NOT guarantee admission -- holistic review. IMPORTANT DISTINCTION: Building Construction has substantially DIFFERENT requirements from engineering majors. Math: MATH 1025 (Elementary Calculus) OR MATH 1225 (Calc 1) -- not the full Calc 1/2/3 sequence. No required Physics or Chemistry on official Transfer Roadmap. BC is a non-restricted major -- FTIC students apply directly to BC (unlike other engineering majors). Transfer students also directly admitted to BC. [Source: VT Building Construction Roadmap 2025-2026 PDF snippet -- MATH 1025 or 1225 only confirmed]

Verified vs engineering.virginia.edu/undergraduate-study/future-undergrads/transferring-uva-engineering and UVA SEAS GAA Transfer Guide 2025-2027 via transfervirginia.org (May 2026). CRITICAL: UVA SEAS does NOT admit students directly into a major -- major declared AFTER admission. Physics lab MUST be completed IN-PERSON to receive lab credit (PHYS 1429, 2419). APMA 1090 (Calc 1) NEW requirement added for students entering Fall 2025 and later. UVA SEAS offers 11 undergraduate degrees total.
